description.en: Audit corporate site and backoffice in your company monorepo with Lighthouse (before/after), document root causes in AUDIT.md, apply targeted fixes and refactors guided by agent skills, and prove impact in REPORT.md with committed screenshots.
description.es: Audita el sitio corporativo y el backoffice en tu monorepo con Lighthouse (antes/después), documenta causas raíz en AUDIT.md, aplica correcciones y refactorizaciones guiadas por skills de agente, y demuestra el impacto en REPORT.md con capturas en el repositorio.

sharing.en: I just completed Frontend Performance Audit with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-frontend-performance-audit #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #lighthouse
